atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain that began approximately two days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain following a fall while playing tennis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports attempting to volley the ball.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports falling on his foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wrapping the foot with ace wraps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports icing the foot last night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ibuprofen providing some relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the effect of ibuprofen wearing off.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior injuries to this foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previously injuring his left leg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals bruising of the plantar and dorsal aspects of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is associated swelling in the midfoot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation elicits tenderness in the midfoot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The piano key test of the first and second metatarsals is positive.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neurovascular exam is intact.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are stable: blood pressure 125/70 mmHg, respiratory rate 18, temperature 97.1°F, and pulse 60 beats per minute.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-ray reveals subtle dorsal displacement of the base of the second metatarsal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is a 3 mm separation of the first and second metatarsal bases.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is a bony fragment in the listerfranc joint space.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung exam reveals mild stridor.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Abdominal exam is unremarkable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Right foot pain, consistent with a Lisfranc fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend surgical intervention for the Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order an MRI to further assess the fracture and ligament injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has potential for poor ligament healing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has potential for flatfoot development

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend a cast and crutches for six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Initiate physical therapy post-surgery

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Provide patient with written instructions regarding cast care, crutch use, and activity restrictions

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in one week for cast removal and initial assessment of healing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks if symptoms persist
